summary: Verified cache-first player/team resolution system. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). MongoDB cache contains 1225 leagues, 1158 teams, 23992 players, 485 national teams. Accent-stripped matching (nameClean) works correctly for Nordic characters (Højbjerg→Hojbjerg, Ødegaard→Odegaard, Mbappé→Mbappe). Word-boundary matching correctly finds 'Saka' without matching 'Wan-Bissaka'. Team lookups correctly distinguish club (Arsenal=42) vs national (Czechia=770, Denmark=21) types.
passed_tests: GET /api/cache/status returns valid counts (leagues=1225, teams=1158, players=23992, nationalTeams=485)
GET /api/cache/lookup/player?name=Hojbjerg finds P. Højbjerg (accent-stripped via nameClean)
GET /api/cache/lookup/player?name=Salah&team_id=40 finds Mohamed Salah at Liverpool (not I. Salah)
GET /api/cache/lookup/player?name=Saka finds B. Saka at Arsenal (word-boundary matching, not Wan-Bissaka)
GET /api/cache/lookup/player?name=Odegaard&team_id=42 finds M. Ødegaard at Arsenal
GET /api/cache/lookup/player?name=Mbappe&team_id=541 finds Kylian Mbappé at Real Madrid
GET /api/cache/lookup/team?name=Arsenal returns club type with teamId=42
GET /api/cache/lookup/team?name=Czechia returns national type with teamId=770
GET /api/cache/lookup/team?name=Denmark returns national type with teamId=21
GET /api/cache/players?team_id=42 returns Arsenal squad (34 players) with B. Saka
POST /api/scan-prop returns 422 on empty body (endpoint exists)
POST /api/scan-prop returns 422/500 on invalid base64 (proper error handling)
critical_code_review_comments: cache.py get_player_by_name uses 4-tier search strategy: exact nameClean → last name end-of-string → full name word-boundary → last name word-boundary
Word-boundary regex (\b) correctly prevents 'Saka' from matching 'Wan-Bissaka'
Accent-stripped nameClean field enables searching 'Hojbjerg' to find 'Højbjerg'
Team lookup correctly checks national teams first, then club teams
scan.py uses cache-first resolution with API-Sports as fallback only

test_credentials.owner_email: josselj001@gmail.com (auto-login via verify-whop, no password needed)

seed_data_creation: None - using existing MongoDB cache data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cache-first resolution system verified. MongoDB cache has 23992 players with nameClean field for accent-stripped matching. Key lookups verified: Højbjerg (accent), Salah (team filter), Saka (word boundary), Ødegaard (accent+team), Mbappé (accent+team). National teams: Czechia=770, Denmark=21. Club teams: Arsenal=42. scan.py uses _resolve_player_via_cache as PRIMARY method with API-Sports fallback.

accent_stripped_matching.Mbappe: Found Kylian Mbappé (ID: 278) at Real Madrid

word_boundary_matching.Saka: Found B. Saka (ID: 1460) at Arsenal - NOT Wan-Bissaka

team_filter_matching.Salah_team_40: Found Mohamed Salah (ID: 306) at Liverpool - NOT I. Salah from Basel
